problems.question: Be sure to (　　) vitamin tablets every morning.
problems.ja: 毎朝必ずビタミン錠を飲みなさい。
problems.en: Be sure to take vitamin tablets every morning.

problems.question: Have you decided where we will (　　) the birthday party for Mitsuo?
problems.ja: ミツオの誕生パーティーをどこで開くか決めましたか。
problems.en: Have you decided where we will hold the birthday party for Mitsuo?

problems.question: He may be <u>fired</u> soon because his boss will no longer tolerate his tardiness.
problems.ja: 彼は上司が遅刻をもはや許さないので，もうすぐ解雇されるかもしれない。
problems.en: He may be fired soon because his boss will no longer tolerate his tardiness.

problems.question: Walter found it difficult to tell the truth, so he had to (　　) a story.
problems.ja: ウォルターは真実を話しづらいと思ったので，作り話をしなければならなかった。
problems.en: Walter found it difficult to tell the truth, so he had to invent a story.

problems.question: Many developing countries are (　　) serious drinking-water shortages.
problems.ja: 多くの発展途上国が深刻な飲み水の不足に直面している。
problems.en: Many developing countries are facing serious drinking-water shortages.

problems.question: It's only a small house but it (　　) my needs perfectly.
problems.ja: ほんの小さな家ですが，私の要求を完璧に満たしている。
problems.en: It's only a small house but it meets my needs perfectly.

problems.question: What do you think of Mr. Owen's proposal for cutting costs in the factory? I like his idea, but I don't think it will (　　) very well.
problems.ja: 工場のコストを削減するというオーウェン氏の提案をどう思いますか。アイディアは気に入っていますが，あまりうまくいかないと思います。
problems.en: What do you think of Mr. Owen's proposal for cutting costs in the factory? I like his idea, but I don't think it will work very well.

problems.question: For their safety and the safety of others, drivers must (　　) the traffic rules.
problems.ja: ドライバーは，自分と他人の安全のために，交通規則を守らなければならない。
problems.en: For their safety and the safety of others, drivers must observe the traffic rules.

problems.question: Our bus was caught in a traffic (　　), so we were late for the meeting.
problems.ja: 乗っているバスが渋滞に巻き込まれたので，私たちは会議に遅れた。
problems.en: Our bus was caught in a traffic jam, so we were late for the meeting.

problems.question:
A: Excuse me, but can you tell me how to get to the post office?
B: I'm sorry, but (　　), so I don't know.
problems.ja:
A: すみません。郵便局へはどう行けばいいのですか。
B: ごめんなさい。私はこの辺りは初めてなので，わかりません。
problems.en: B: I'm sorry, but I'm a stranger around here, so I don't know.

problems.question: Robert had no money in his bank (　　).
problems.ja: ロバートは銀行口座にお金がまったくなかった。
problems.en: Robert had no money in his bank account.

problems.question: Thieves broke into the (　　) and stole everything in it.
problems.ja: 泥棒たちが金庫に押し入り，中にあったすべてを盗んだ。
problems.en: Thieves broke into the safe and stole everything in it.

problems.question: Do you have a particular <u>end</u> in mind? What are you trying to achieve?
problems.ja: 何か特定の目的が念頭にありますか。何を達成しようとしているのですか。
problems.en: Do you have a particular end in mind? What are you trying to achieve?

problems.question: Everyone is worried that the company will be losing a lot of money, but that (　　) was not discussed at the meeting.
problems.ja: だれもが会社が大きな損失を出すのではと心配しているが，その話題については会議で議論されなかった。
problems.en: Everyone is worried that the company will be losing a lot of money, but that subject was not discussed at the meeting.

problems.question: Learning the language is a (　　) if you really want to understand a foreign culture.
problems.ja: ある外国の文化を本気で理解したいのなら，その国の言葉を学ぶことが絶対に必要だ。
problems.en: Learning the language is a must if you really want to understand a foreign culture.

problems.question: Tom is the very (　　) of his father thirty years ago.
problems.ja: トムは30年前の父親にそっくりだ。
problems.en: Tom is the very image of his father thirty years ago.

problems.question:
"She always looks nice, don't you think?"
"Yeah, I think she has very good (　　) in clothes."
problems.ja: 「彼女はいつもおしゃれだと思いませんか」「そうだね。彼女は服のセンスがとてもいいと思う」
problems.en: "Yeah, I think she has very good taste in clothes."

problems.question:
She speaks French extremely well.
= She has a good (　　) of French.
problems.ja:
彼女は非常に上手にフランス語を話す。
彼女はフランス語が堪能だ。
problems.en: She has a good command of French.

problems.question: Last night a news program was <u>on the air</u> instead of the weekly drama.
problems.ja: 昨夜は，毎週のドラマではなくニュース番組が放送された。
problems.en: Last night a news program was on the air instead of the weekly drama.

problems.question: After his passionate speech we gave the speaker a big (　　).
problems.ja: 彼の熱のこもった演説が終わり，私たちは盛大な拍手を送った。
problems.en: After his passionate speech we gave the speaker a big hand.

problems.question: Why don't you <u>give her a ring</u>?
problems.ja: 彼女に電話をかけたらどうですか。
problems.en: Why don't you give her a ring?

problems.question: My brother's wife is away for the week, so I thought I'd go over and <u>keep him company</u>.
problems.ja: 私の兄［弟］の奥さんが一週間不在になるので，私は兄［弟］のところに行って，兄［弟］と一緒にいようと思った。
problems.en: My brother's wife is away for the week, so I thought I'd go over and keep him company.

problems.question:
彼女がいつ来るのかまったく見当がつかない。
We have absolutely (idea / no / she / time / turn / up / what / will).
problems.rawAnswer: no idea what time she will turn up
problems.ja: 彼女がいつ来るのかまったく見当がつかない。
problems.answer: no idea what time she will turn up
problems.en: We have absolutely no idea what time she will turn up.

problems.question:
ペイジがどんな人なのかまるで見当もつかない。（１語不要）
I don't (have / how / idea / like / looks / Paige / slightest /the / what).
problems.rawAnswer: have the slightest idea what Paige looks like（how不要）
problems.ja: ペイジがどんな人なのかまるで見当もつかない。（１語不要）
problems.answer: have the slightest idea what Paige looks like
problems.en: I don't have the slightest idea what Paige looks like.

problems.question: We received a letter from that company to the (　　) that they could not accept our offer.
problems.ja: 私たちの申し出に応じられないという旨の手紙を，その会社から受け取った。
problems.en: We received a letter from that company to the effect that they could not accept our offer.

problems.question: The traffic was so (　　) that it took us more than two hours to get to the airport.
problems.ja: 交通量がとても多かったので，私たちが空港に到着するのに２時間以上かかった。
problems.en: The traffic was so heavy that it took us more than two hours to get to the airport.

problems.question: I arrived here early today because the traffic was (　　) than usual.
problems.ja: 交通量がいつもよりも少なかったので，私は今日は早くここに到着した。
problems.en: I arrived here early today because the traffic was lighter than usual.

problems.question: I'm sorry I'm late. I had a (　　) tire.
problems.ja: 遅れてごめんなさい。タイヤがパンクしました。
problems.en: I'm sorry I'm late. I had a flat tire.

problems.question: He couldn't use his cellular phone because the battery was (　　).
problems.ja: バッテリーが切れていたので，彼は携帯電話を使うことができなかった。
problems.en: He couldn't use his cellular phone because the battery was dead.

problems.question: I like my coffee (　　).
problems.ja: 私のコーヒーは薄くしてください。
problems.en: I like my coffee weak.

problems.question: The (　　) was so thick that my flight was cancelled.
problems.ja: とても深い霧だったので飛行機は欠航になった。
problems.en: The fog was so thick that my flight was cancelled.

problems.question: Stress-related illnesses are very (　　) among middle-aged businessmen.
problems.ja: ストレス性疾患は中年のビジネスマンの間ではとてもよく見られる。
problems.en: Stress-related illnesses are very common among middle-aged businessmen.

problems.question: In my school, when a (　　) teacher is absent, another teacher teaches the class instead.
problems.ja: 私の学校では，受け持ちの教師が休むと，別の教師が代わりに授業を行う。
problems.en: In my school, when a regular teacher is absent, another teacher teaches the class instead.

problems.question: "How is your steak, Jack? Is it tender?" "No. It's very (　　)."
problems.ja: 「ジャック，あなたのステーキはどう？　柔らかい？」「いや，とても堅い」
problems.en: "How is your steak, Jack? Is it tender?" "No. It's very tough."

problems.question: I skied every day for five days (　　).
problems.ja: 私は連続５日間スキーをした。
problems.en: I skied every day for five days straight.

problems.question: The carpenters haven't (　　) finished the job yet.
problems.ja: 大工たちはその仕事をまだ完全には終えていない。
problems.en: The carpenters haven't quite finished the job yet.

problems.question: The fog was so thick that the driver could (　　) see the traffic.
problems.ja: 霧がとても濃かったのでドライバーには車の往来がほとんど見えなかった。
problems.en: The fog was so thick that the driver could barely see the traffic.

problems.question: The cups and saucers cost $5 and $7 (　　).
problems.ja: そのカップと受け皿の値段はそれぞれ５ドルと７ドルである。
problems.en: The cups and saucers cost $5 and $7 respectively.

problems.question: You can buy tickets for the football game (　　) or in groups of four.
problems.ja: そのサッカーの試合のチケットは，１人用と４人用が購入できます。
problems.en: You can buy tickets for the football game individually or in groups of four.

problems.question: Kate has released a book which <u>contains</u> five short stories.
problems.ja: ケイトは５つの短編を含む本を刊行した。
problems.en: Kate has released a book which contains five short stories.

problems.question: Two Californian towns, Davis and Palo Alto, have <u>banned</u> smoking in public space.
problems.ja: デイビスとパロアルトという２つのカリフォルニアの町が公共の場での喫煙を禁止した。
problems.en: Two Californian towns, Davis and Palo Alto, have banned smoking in public space.

problems.question: The man at the service center said he could not <u>fix</u> my car.
problems.ja: サービスセンターのその男性は私の車を修理することはできないと言った。
problems.en: The man at the service center said he could not fix my car.

problems.question: Marilyn asked me so charmingly that I could hardly <u>refuse</u> her request.
problems.ja: マリリンはとても魅力的に私に頼んだので，私は彼女の要求をほとんど断ることができなかった。
problems.en: Marilyn asked me so charmingly that I could hardly refuse her request.

problems.question: The principal managed to <u>keep</u> the students' interest until the end of her speech.
problems.ja: その校長はスピーチが終わるまで，生徒の関心をなんとか維持した。
problems.en: The principal managed to keep the students' interest until the end of her speech.

problems.question: My favorite actor played an important <u>part</u> in the drama.
problems.ja: 私の大好きな俳優がそのドラマで重要な役を演じた。
problems.en: My favorite actor played an important part in the drama.

problems.question: It has been almost <u>a decade</u> since I married my husband.
problems.ja: 私が夫と結婚して，ほぼ10年になります。
problems.en: It has been almost a decade since I married my husband.

problems.question: The safety of nuclear power is a major <u>concern</u> in most advanced countries of the world today.
problems.ja: 原子力の安全性は，今日たいていの先進国において大きな問題となっている。
problems.en: The safety of nuclear power is a major concern in most advanced countries of the world today.

problems.question: The governor wanted time to study the <u>consequences</u> of global warming.
problems.ja: その知事は地球温暖化の影響を調査する時間がほしかった。
problems.en: The governor wanted time to study the consequences of global warming.

problems.question: As civilization grew more <u>complex</u>, better methods of communication were needed.
problems.ja: 文明が複雑になるにつれて，コミュニケーションのより良い方法が必要とされた。
problems.en: As civilization grew more complex, better methods of communication were needed.

problems.question: Many people believe that automobiles are <u>essential</u> to modern life.
problems.ja: 多くの人々が自動車は現代生活に必要不可欠だと信じている。
problems.en: Many people believe that automobiles are essential to modern life.

problems.question: The year 1776 is a very <u>significant</u> one in American history. It is the year the country was born.
problems.ja: 1776年はアメリカの歴史において非常に重要な年だ。国が誕生した年なのだ。
problems.en: The year 1776 is a very significant one in American history. It is the year the country was born.

problems.question: You should be careful not to make a <u>fundamental</u> mistake in writing.
problems.ja: あなたは作文において基本的な間違いをしないように注意するべきだ。
problems.en: You should be careful not to make a fundamental mistake in writing.

problems.question: We have <u>sufficient</u> time because the train leaves at 10:30.
problems.ja: 列車は10時半に出発するので，私たちには十分な時間がある。
problems.en: We have sufficient time because the train leaves at 10:30.

problems.question: The results of both experiments were <u>identical</u>.
problems.ja: 両方の実験結果はまったく同じだった。
problems.en: The results of both experiments were identical.

problems.question: An <u>annual</u> meeting is held once a year.
problems.ja: 年次総会は年に１回開催される。
problems.en: An annual meeting is held once a year.

problems.question: Although I was going to be rather busy on that day, I decided to (　　) the invitation to the party.
problems.ja: その日はかなり忙しくなりそうだったが，パーティーへの招待に応じることにした。
problems.en: Although I was going to be rather busy on that day, I decided to accept the invitation to the party.

problems.question: Jane works part-time as a pianist at a restaurant, and she (　　) 500 dollars a week.
problems.ja: ジェーンはレストランでピアニストとしてアルバイトをしており，週に500ドル稼ぐ。
problems.en: Jane works part-time as a pianist at a restaurant, and she earns 500 dollars a week.

problems.question: The rumor is (　　) that a shopping mall will open in that vacant lot next year.
problems.ja: 来年あの空き地にショッピングセンターがオープンするといううわさが広がっている。
problems.en: The rumor is spreading that a shopping mall will open in that vacant lot next year.

problems.question: The game on the main court was (　　) by a brief shower.
problems.ja: メインコートの試合はにわか雨で中断された。
problems.en: The game on the main court was interrupted by a brief shower.

problems.question: Brett has many spare-time (　　): he swims, paints, plays the violin, and so on.
problems.ja: ブレットは，水泳，絵画，バイオリンの演奏など余暇の活動が多彩だ。
problems.en: Brett has many spare-time activities: he swims, paints, plays the violin, and so on.

problems.question: The new airport is very busy. There are more than 100 arrivals and (　　) every day.
problems.ja: 新空港はとてもにぎわっている。毎日100便以上の発着がある。
problems.en: The new airport is very busy. There are more than 100 arrivals and departures every day.

problems.question: Usually in Aomori, there is a considerable (　　) of snow in the month of January.
problems.ja: 青森ではたいてい１月にかなりの量の雪が降る。
problems.en: Usually in Aomori, there is a considerable amount of snow in the month of January.

problems.question: In summer, with air conditioners on all day, electricity (　　) rises sharply.
problems.ja: 夏はエアコンを１日中つけっぱなしにするので，電気消費量が急増する。
problems.en: In summer, with air conditioners on all day, electricity consumption rises sharply.

problems.question: Because the storm had left so many people homeless, there was a (　　) of beds at the shelter.
problems.ja: その台風で非常に多くの人々が家を失ったので，避難所のベッドが足りなくなった。
problems.en: Because the storm had left so many people homeless, there was a shortage of beds at the shelter.

problems.question: Our new house is in the middle of the town and has good (　　) to the shops.
problems.ja: 私たちの新居は街の中心にあるので，お店に行くのがとても便利だ。
problems.en: Our new house is in the middle of the town and has good access to the shops.

problems.question: Mario passed his driving test on his first (　　).
problems.ja: マリオは運転免許の試験に一発で合格した。
problems.en: Mario passed his driving test on his first attempt.

problems.question: Don't blame me for what happened. It wasn't my (　　).
problems.ja: 起きたことで私のせいにしないでください。私の責任ではなかったのです。
problems.en: Don't blame me for what happened. It wasn't my fault.

problems.question: It's a (　　) your wife couldn't come. I really wanted to meet her.
problems.ja: あなたの奥さんが来られなかったのは残念です。本当に会いたかったのです。
problems.en: It's a shame your wife couldn't come. I really wanted to meet her.

problems.question: Our multilingual cabin crew will assist you in any (　　) they can.
problems.ja: 多言語担当乗組員は可能なかぎりどんな方法でもみなさまをお助けします。
problems.en: Our multilingual cabin crew will assist you in any way they can.

problems.question: We have to find (　　) to the world's environmental problems.
problems.ja: 世界の環境問題の解決策を見つけなければならない。
problems.en: We have to find solutions to the world's environmental problems.

problems.question: The flowers on the table were so beautiful. When I touched them, however, I found they were (　　).
problems.ja: テーブルの上の花はとてもきれいだった。しかし，触ってみると造花だとわかった。
problems.en: The flowers on the table were so beautiful. When I touched them, however, I found they were artificial.

problems.question: John is looking for a (　　) job because he wants more time with his family.
problems.ja: ジョンは，家族といっしょに過ごす時間がもっとほしいので，融通の利く仕事を探している。
problems.en: John is looking for a flexible job because he wants more time with his family.

problems.question: Our PE teacher, a (　　) professional basketball player, is coaching the school team.
problems.ja: 元プロバスケットボール選手の私たちの体育の先生は，学校のバスケットボール部の指導をしている。
problems.en: Our PE teacher, a former professional basketball player, is coaching the school team.

problems.question:
Eric:Is he a very (　　) person?
Susan:Yes, he is. He never breaks promises and he always pays money back if he borrows it.
problems.ja:
エリック：彼はとても頼りになる人なのですか。
スーザン：はい，そうです。彼は決して約束を破りませんし，借りたお金はいつも返します。
problems.en: Eric:Is he a very reliable person?

problems.question: Mary is a (　　) person. She always lends us money when we need.
problems.ja: メアリーは気前が良い人だ。必要なときにはいつもお金を貸してくれる。
problems.en: Mary is a generous person. She always lends us money when we need.

problems.question: It becomes more (　　) that human activity is the main cause of global warming when it is also observed on Mars and other planets.
problems.ja: 火星や他の惑星でも温暖化が観察されるので，人間の活動が地球温暖化の主な原因であるというのはより疑わしくなる。
problems.en: It becomes more doubtful that human activity is the main cause of global warming when it is also observed on Mars and other planets.

problems.question: I asked the hotel if they have a room (　　) for three nights.
problems.ja: ３泊できる空き室があるかどうかホテルに問い合わせた。
problems.en: I asked the hotel if they have a room available for three nights.

problems.question: I (　　) the hotel reservation by telephone.
problems.ja: 私は電話でホテルの予約を確認した。
problems.en: I confirmed the hotel reservation by telephone.

problems.question: The department store (　　) the sale until Monday.
problems.ja: そのデパートは月曜日までセールを延長した。
problems.en: The department store extended the sale until Monday.

problems.question: Things are happening a lot faster than anyone (　　).
problems.ja: 事態はだれもが予測した以上に，ずっと速く起こっている。
problems.en: Things are happening a lot faster than anyone predicted.

problems.question: I hadn't seen Emi for years, but when I saw her in the street, I (　　) her at once.
problems.ja: 私は何年もエミに会っていなかったが，通りで彼女を見たとき，すぐに彼女だとわかった。
problems.en: I hadn't seen Emi for years, but when I saw her in the street, I recognized her at once.

problems.question: I have to get my commuter pass renewed because it (　　) tomorrow.
problems.ja: 明日で定期券の期限が切れるので更新しなければならない。
problems.en: I have to get my commuter pass renewed because it expires tomorrow.

problems.question: There are more than fifty (　　) in this company.
problems.ja: この会社には50人以上の従業員がいる。
problems.en: There are more than fifty employees in this company.

problems.question: By 2010 Japan will pass Sweden and Switzerland to lead the world in the (　　) of elderly to the rest of the population.
problems.ja: 2010年までに，高齢者の，それ以外の人々に対する比率において，日本はスウェーデンとスイスを追い越して，世界のトップに立つだろう。
problems.en: By 2010 Japan will pass Sweden and Switzerland to lead the world in the proportion of elderly to the rest of the population.

problems.question: Patti got (　　) from her boss to leave work early.
problems.ja: パティーは早めに退社してよいという許可を上司から得た。
problems.en: Patti got permission from her boss to leave work early.

problems.question: He can never hide his strong (　　) for sweets.
problems.ja: 彼は甘い物が大好きだということを隠すことができない。
problems.en: He can never hide his strong preference for sweets.

problems.question: In many countries, it is (　　) to sell alcohol drinks to people under 18.
problems.ja: 多くの国では，18歳以下の人にアルコール飲料を売るのは違法である。
problems.en: In many countries, it is illegal to sell alcohol drinks to people under 18.

problems.question: When I saw her before the exam, she seemed very (　　) about it.
problems.ja: 私が試験の前に彼女を見たとき，彼女はそのことについてとても自信があるように見えた。
problems.en: When I saw her before the exam, she seemed very confident about it.

problems.question: This is a (　　) place for a picnic.
problems.ja: ここはピクニックに適した場所だ。
problems.en: This is a suitable place for a picnic.

problems.question: Today, 60 percent of (　　) waste in Japan consists of packaging.
problems.ja: 今日，日本の使い捨て廃棄物の60％は包装物から成り立っている。
problems.en: Today, 60 percent of disposable waste in Japan consists of packaging.

problems.question: There is some problem with my car and it is being repaired. I need to find some (　　) kind of transportation.
problems.ja: 私の車はちょっと問題があって修理中だ。何らかのそれに代わる交通手段を見つける必要がある。
problems.en: There is some problem with my car and it is being repaired. I need to find some alternative kind of transportation.
